queries: E2E pipeline Using SQL for Data Transformation recent authoritative
action.query: E2E pipeline Using SQL for Data Transformation recent authoritative

annotations.title: ELT-Bench: An End-to-End Benchmark for Evaluating AI Agents on ELT Pipelines
Testing Capabilities and Tools for Data Engineers – Part 2
Senior SAP HANA Developer - E2E Implementation | hirist.tech
GitHub - alexanderbean/E2E-Data-Engineering-in-Azure: End-to-end ETL pipeline in the Microsoft Azure cloud - (Jun '24 - Jul '24)

content.text:
Designing an efficient end-to-end (E2E) data pipeline that leverages SQL for data transformation is crucial for ensuring data integrity and performance. Here are several authoritative and recent resources that provide valuable insights into this topic:

1. **"ELT-Bench: An End-to-End Benchmark for Evaluating AI Agents on ELT Pipelines"**  
   This 2025 study introduces ELT-Bench, a benchmark designed to assess AI agents' capabilities in building ELT pipelines. It highlights the challenges in automating data transformation processes and underscores the importance of robust pipeline design. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.04808?utm_source=openai))

2. **"Testing Capabilities and Tools for Data Engineers – Part 2"**  
   Published in 2022, this article discusses the significance of end-to-end testing in data pipelines. It emphasizes the need for comprehensive testing strategies to ensure data quality and reliability throughout the pipeline. ([eckerson.com](https://www.eckerson.com/articles/testing-capabilities-and-tools-for-data-engineers-part-2?utm_source=openai))

3. **"10 Best Practices for Maintaining Data Pipelines"**  
   This recent guide outlines essential practices for maintaining data pipelines, including the necessity of quality checks and monitoring. It provides actionable recommendations to enhance pipeline stability and performance. ([matillion.com](https://www.matillion.com/download?lv=Qq%252B89FKOdWUZ9AC%252BS8Z%252F6TAxZDNmZjJiMzU0NzJjZmRmN2Y4YmIwNjBlMDk1MDk2NzkwZDBhOGJlNjE2MmViOThhOGE5MDA2OTMwYmQ4OGP3DCJNk%252B9OJy0kiEiOCKe5iYll4E%252FC9thSQ9V4P5zA1WTFdbjFIlbc5Xbl32zscMML4M2CJYYe8AhJ5VsMPI1iR4REj1SDbMuTFAEJpJ8KhKKelUivKtVbpbGsuWA%252FE2MYGnCkF0hfBeW0Ljc7J0HsSGTeTX3RrAufdK906V1%252FoWaCqKvMR9dPLS%252FNDXmySoSUu%252B4TAqNzLlx%252BJbQZUOmoSpeAN%252BM%252FqgGsHO72h24o2w%253D%253D&utm_source=openai))

4. **"Senior Apache Kafka Data Engineer"**  
   A job description from Accenture detailing the responsibilities of a Senior Apache Kafka Data Engineer. It highlights the importance of designing and developing E2E data pipelines, including data transformation, ingestion, and processing, using technologies like Azure, Databricks, and Data Factory. ([accenture.com](https://www.accenture.com/id-en/careers/jobdetails?id=R00282008_en&title=Senior+Apache+Kafka+Data+Engineer&utm_source=openai))

5. **"Senior SAP HANA Developer - E2E Implementation"**  
   This job posting emphasizes the role of a Senior SAP HANA Developer in implementing end-to-end SAP HANA solutions. It focuses on developing and optimizing complex SQL and PLSQL scripts for data extraction, transformation, and loading (ETL). ([hirist.tech](https://www.hirist.tech/j/senior-sap-hana-developer-e2e-implementation-1563077?utm_source=openai))

6. **"DBT Core/BI Developer"**  
   A freelance opportunity for a DBT Core/BI Developer, highlighting the role's focus on designing, building, and deploying scalable data pipelines with an emphasis on SQL-based data modeling and transformation. ([freelancermap.com](https://www.freelancermap.com/project/dbt-core-bi-developer?utm_source=openai))

7. **"Gijs Mulder | Data Engineer"**  
   A personal portfolio showcasing the work of a data engineer experienced in building clean, scalable data systems. It includes projects involving the design and optimization of data pipelines using SQL and Python. ([gijsmulder.nl](https://gijsmulder.nl/?utm_source=openai))

8. **"End-to-End ETL Pipeline in Microsoft Azure"**  
   A GitHub repository detailing the creation of an end-to-end ETL pipeline in Microsoft Azure. It provides insights into the practical implementation of data pipelines, including data transformation using SQL. ([github.com](https://github.com/alexanderbean/E2E-Data-Engineering-in-Azure?utm_source=openai))

These resources offer a comprehensive understanding of best practices, tools, and real-world applications for designing and implementing E2E data pipelines with SQL-based data transformations.
